panels.description: Medium shot: Scrooge lying in bed, trembling violently, surrounded by an intense, overwhelming, and mysterious ruddy light filling the room, shadows cast against the wall, anxious expression, Victorian bedroom setting.

bubbles.text: What does this light mean? Am I... am I burning?

panels.description: Medium close-up: Scrooge, in his nightgown and slippers, cautiously stepping toward the door of the adjoining room, looking toward the light source, hesitant posture, heavy shadows in the corridor.

bubbles.text: The light... it comes from there.

panels.description: Close-up: Scrooge's hand touching the brass doorknob, expression of sudden realization and dread, slight motion lines indicating a sudden halt.

Wide establishing shot: The room transformed into a magical grove of holly and ivy. A massive, jolly Ghost of Christmas Present sits on a throne of festive food—turkeys, cakes, and punch. He holds a glowing, horn-shaped torch. Scrooge stands in the doorway, small and hunched, staring in awe.

bubbles.text: Come in! Come in! and know me better, man!
